subcodes.first_line: The remembrance of God hath, in truth, appeared from the horizon of revelation as a witness, that He may summon mankind unto that station which was inscribed in the Tablet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر الله قد کان من افق الوحی بالحق مشهودا لیدعو الناس الی مقام کان فی اللوح
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @exhortations and counsels, @transcendence; unknowability of God
